name: Effect
comment:
This module provides a [`Effect`](#Effect) type that carry both Cmd and messages for
a shared update


# Create

@docs Effect, none, batch, fromCmd, fromSharedCmd, fromShared, perform, attempt


# Transform

@docs map, toCmd


# Join effect to a model

These functions join an effect to a given model, for using pipeline syntax in
your 'update' functions

@docs with, withNone, withBatch, withCmd, withSharedCmd, withShared, withMap, withPerform, withAttempt


# Add effect to a (model, effect) pair

These functions add a new effect to a given (model, effect) pair, for using
pipeline syntax in your 'update' functions

@docs add, addBatch, addCmd, addSharedCmd, addShared, addMap, addPerform, addAttempt

unions.name: Effect
unions.comment: A collection of shared and platform effects

values.name: add
values.comment: Add a new Effect to an existing model-Effect pair
values.type: Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addAttempt
values.comment: Add an affect that attempts a Task to an existing model-Effect pair
values.type: (Result.Result x a -> msg) -> Task.Task x a -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addBatch
values.comment: Add a list of new Effect to an existing model-Effect pair
values.type: List.List (Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addCmd
values.comment:
Add a [`Cmd`](/packages/elm/core/latest/Platform-Cmd#Cmd) to an existing
model-Effect pair
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addMap
values.comment: Add a new mapped Effect to an existing model-Effect pair
values.type: (msg1 -> msg) -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg1 -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addPerform
values.comment: Add an affect that performs a Task to an existing model-Effect pair
values.type: (a -> msg) -> Task.Task Basics.Never a -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addShared
values.comment:
Add a new shared Msg to an existing model-Effect pair

    ( model, effect )
        |> Effect.addShared Shared.clearCache
values.type: sharedMsg -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: addSharedCmd
values.comment:
Add a shared [`Cmd`](/packages/elm/core/latest/Platform-Cmd#Cmd) to an existing
model-Effect pair

    ( model, effect )
        |> Effect.addShared Shared.renewToken
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd sharedMsg -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ) -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: attempt
values.comment: Build an effect that attempts a Task
values.type: (Result.Result x a -> msg) -> Task.Task x a -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: batch
values.comment:
Batch effects. Similar to
[`Cmd.map`](/packages/elm/core/latest/Platform-Cmd#batch)
values.type: List.List (Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg) -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: fromCmd
values.comment: Build an effect from a Cmd
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: fromShared
values.comment:
Build an effect from a shared Msg. The message will be send as-is to the
shared update
values.type: sharedMsg -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: fromSharedCmd
values.comment:
Build an effect from a shared Cmd. The result of this command will be handled
by the shared update no matter where it is emitted from
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd sharedMsg -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: map
values.comment:
Transform the messages produced by an Effect. Similar to
[`Cmd.map`](/packages/elm/core/latest/Platform-Cmd#map).
values.type: (a -> b) -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg a -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg b

values.name: none
values.comment: Tells that there are no effect
values.type: Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: perform
values.comment: Build an effect that performs a Task
values.type: (a -> msg) -> Task.Task Basics.Never a -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg

values.name: toCmd
values.comment:
Convert a collection of effect to a connection of
[`Cmd`](/packages/elm/core/latest/Platform-Cmd#Cmd)
values.type: ( sharedMsg -> msg, subMsg -> msg ) -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg subMsg -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: with
values.comment: Wraps the model with the given Effect
values.type: Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withAttempt
values.comment: Wraps the model with an affect that attempts a Task
values.type: (Result.Result x a -> msg) -> Task.Task x a -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withBatch
values.comment:
Wraps the model with a list of Effect

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withBatch [ someEffect, anotherEffect ]
values.type: List.List (Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg) -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withCmd
values.comment:
Wraps the model with a Cmd

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withCmd someCmd
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withMap
values.comment:
Wraps the model with a mapped effect. Should only be used in top-level
packages

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withMap SharedMsg Shared.refreshIdentity
values.type: (msg1 -> msg) -> Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg1 -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withNone
values.comment:
Wraps the model with Effect.none

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withNone
values.type: model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withPerform
values.comment: Wraps the model with an affect that performs a Task
values.type: (a -> msg) -> Task.Task Basics.Never a -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withShared
values.comment:
Wraps the model with a shared Msg

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withCmd Shared.clearCache
values.type: sharedMsg -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

values.name: withSharedCmd
values.comment:
Wraps the model with a shared Cmd

    init : ( Model, Effect Msg )
    init =
        myModel
            |> Effect.withCmd Shared.refreshIdentity
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd sharedMsg -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg )

name: Spa

values.name: addProtectedPage
values.comment: Add a protected page to the application
values.type: ( (currentPageMsg -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)) -> pageView -> view, (Spa.Msg sharedMsg previousPageMsg -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)) -> previousView -> view ) -> (route -> Maybe.Maybe pageFlags) -> (shared -> identity -> Spa.Page pageFlags sharedMsg pageView currentPageModel currentPageMsg) -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg previousView prev prevprev previousPageMsg -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg view currentPageModel (Spa.PageModel prev prevprev) (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)

values.name: addPublicPage
values.comment: Add a public page to the application
values.type: ( (currentPageMsg -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)) -> pageView -> view, (Spa.Msg sharedMsg previousPageMsg -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)) -> previousView -> view ) -> (route -> Maybe.Maybe pageFlags) -> (shared -> Spa.Page pageFlags sharedMsg pageView currentPageModel currentPageMsg) -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg previousView prev prevprev previousPageMsg -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg view currentPageModel (Spa.PageModel prev prevprev) (Spa.PageMsg currentPageMsg previousPageMsg)

values.name: application
values.comment:
Finalize the Spa application into a record suitable for the `Browser.application`

`toDocument` is a function that convert a view to a `Browser.Document`

    appWithPages
        |> Spa.application { toDocument = View.toDocument }
        |> Browser.application
values.type: { toDocument : shared -> view -> Browser.Document (Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg) } -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg view current previous pageMsg -> { init : flags -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> ( Spa.Model route shared current previous, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg) ), view : Spa.Model route shared current previous -> Browser.Document (Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg), update : Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg -> Spa.Model route shared current previous -> ( Spa.Model route shared current previous, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg) ), subscriptions : Spa.Model route shared current previous -> Platform.Sub.Sub (Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg), onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> Spa.Msg sharedMsg pageMsg }

values.name: init
values.comment:
Bootstrap a Spa application

    Spa.init
        { init = Shared.init
        , subscriptions = Shared.subscriptions
        , update = Shared.update
        , defaultView = View.defaultView
        , toRoute = Route.toRoute
        , extractIdentity = Shared.identity
        , protectPage = Route.toUrl >> Just >> Route.SignIn >> Route.toUrl
        }
values.type: { init : flags -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> ( shared, Platform.Cmd.Cmd sharedMsg ), subscriptions : shared -> Platform.Sub.Sub sharedMsg, update : sharedMsg -> shared -> ( shared, Platform.Cmd.Cmd sharedMsg ), defaultView : view, toRoute : Url.Url -> route, extractIdentity : shared -> Maybe.Maybe identity, protectPage : route -> String.String } -> Spa.Builder flags route identity shared sharedMsg view () () ()

values.name: initNoShared
values.comment: Bootstrap a Spa application that has no Shared state
values.type: (Url.Url -> route) -> view -> Spa.Builder () route () () () view () () ()

values.name: element
values.comment:
Create a page that can communicate with the outside world.

It is the page equivalent of a [element program](/packages/elm/browser/latest/Browser#element)
values.type: { init : flags -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Effect.Effect sharedMsg msg ), view : model -> view, subscriptions : model -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg } -> Internal.Page flags sharedMsg view model msg

values.name: sandbox
values.comment:
Create a "sandboxed" page that cannot communicate with the outside world.

It is the page equivalent of a [sanboxed program](/packages/elm/browser/latest/Browser#sandbox)
values.type: { init : flags -> model, update : msg -> model -> model, view : model -> view } -> Internal.Page flags sharedMsg view model msg

values.name: static
values.comment: Create a static page that has no state, only a view
values.type: view -> Internal.Page flags sharedMsg view () ()
